Hydra Scheduler — Workers

Hydra Scheduler workers are stateless container runtimes that pull scheduled tasks from the Hydra Scheduler priority queue. Hydra Scheduler worker pools are sized by concurrency limits per pool; the Hydra Scheduler control plane enforces fair-share dispatch across pools. Hydra Scheduler workers report task heartbeats every five seconds over the long-poll gRPC stream; missed heartbeats cause Hydra Scheduler to reassign in-flight tasks to a different worker.
